Telescopes with 5 mm thick lithium drifted
Hardware particle-identification system was used for

Energy resolution of telescopes at most forward angles
was affected by signal pile-up due to high counting
Target thicknesses were obtained from measurements of
Rutherford cross sections using the 25 MeV alpha-
particle beam from Radial Ridge cyclotron at the
Energy calibration of spectra was achieved using peaks
The error in the absolute cross sections
was estimated to be -5%. No additional information.
